layout.planSummary: Feature access depends on your plan.

toasts.invalidFormatDescription: Use PNG, JPG, WEBP, or GIF.
toasts.invalidSessionDescription: Sign in again to save your profile.
toasts.missingDataDescription: Complete first and last name to save your profile.
toasts.unexpectedErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
toasts.updatedDescription: Your profile data was saved successfully.
toasts.selectOppositionDescription: Choose a valid exam track before changing.
toasts.noChangesDescription: This exam track is already selected.
toasts.oppositionUpdatedDescription: From now on, Tests and Syllabus will use this exam track.
toasts.localeUpdateFailedDescription: Try again in a few seconds.
toasts.localeUpdatedDescription: Language was applied and saved to your profile.
toasts.paymentPortalRedirectDescription: Redirecting you to the secure portal to manage your subscription.
toasts.paymentPortalRedirectErrorDescription: Try again in a few seconds.

myProfile.description: Manage your personal and study information to tailor the full experience.

colorSection.description: This color is applied instantly to primary app elements.

oppositionSection.title: Exam track management
oppositionSection.description: If you change exam track, Tests and Syllabus sections will adjust to the new selection.
oppositionSection.lockedDescription: You have already changed your exam track once. It cannot be changed again.

paymentSection.title: Subscription and billing
paymentSection.description: From the secure portal you can update your payment method, review invoices, or cancel your subscription.
paymentSection.noSubscriptionDescription: You do not have an active paid subscription right now. Once Premium is active, you can manage your subscription from here.

notifications.title: Alert preferences
notifications.description: Choose which channels you want for important replies.
notifications.supportTicketReplyLabel: Email me when staff replies to a ticket
notifications.supportTicketReplyDescription: Receive an email when the team replies to one of your support tickets.

dialog.title: Confirm exam track change
dialog.description: You are about to change your active exam track to "{{opposition}}". Do you want to continue?
dialog.warning: This is your only opportunity to change your exam track. Once confirmed, it cannot be modified again.

toasts.mockReadyDescription: You are about to start a general mock exam for {{opposition}}.
toasts.mockFailedTitle: Unable to generate the mock exam
toasts.mockFailedDescription: There is no official exam configuration available for this exam track.
toasts.selectTopicDescription: Choose at least one topic before launching the quick test.
toasts.selectTopicsDescription: Select at least one topic or block before launching the quick test.
toasts.quickTestFailedDescription: Quick test generation failed. Please try again in a few seconds.
toasts.missingSessionDescription: Sign in again to generate the quick test.

test.title: Tests for your exam track
test.description: You will only see and practice with the active exam track in your profile.
test.planSummary: Test access depends on your plan.
test.planSummaryFree: Tests are available only with the Pro plan.
test.planSummaryPro: Your Pro plan includes access to tests.
test.quickDialogDescription: Choose blocks and topics from {{opposition}} to generate your test.
test.quickDialogQuestionsHint: You can adjust between 1 and {{planLimit}} questions with your current plan.
test.quickDialogNoTopics: There are no topics available for this exam track.
test.inProgressDialogTitle: You already have an active test
test.inProgressDialogHelper: You can resume it now or start a new one.

syllabus.title: Syllabus for your exam track
syllabus.description: Only the active exam track from your profile is shown.
syllabus.pdfOpenFailedDescription: Please try again in a few seconds.
syllabus.viewerInvalidPdf: A valid syllabus PDF could not be identified.
syllabus.viewerLoadFailedDescription: The PDF could not be loaded.
syllabus.viewerPopupBlockedTitle: Could not open a new tab
syllabus.noContent: No syllabus content is available yet for this exam track.
syllabus.noTopics: This exam track does not have uploaded topics yet.
syllabus.contentLockedDescription: With the paid plan you can access the full syllabus content.

assistantAccess.title: AI assistant section
assistantAccess.description: Your assistant for solving questions, generating study plans, and preparing real-time reviews.
assistantAccess.directAccessDescription: Open the full experience to work with prompts, study context, and recommendations.
assistantAccess.planSummary: Your current plan allows {{aiLimit}} AI requests per day.

study.description: Manage your Pomodoro cycle and keep control from any screen.

testSession.title: Generated quick test
testSession.description: Answer the questions and grade at the end.
testSession.missingDataDescription: There is no data available for this test in the current session.
testSession.lockedTitle: Tests are available only in Pro
testSession.lockedDescription: Your current plan does not include access to take tests. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
testSession.readOnlyHistoryDescription: This test is already finished. You can review it, but you cannot take it again on the free plan.
testSession.emptyQuestionsDescription: The backend did not return valid questions for this attempt.
testSession.navigateHint: Tap the number to jump directly to a question.
testSession.disabledQuestionsLabel: {{count}} disabled questions do not count in this test.
testSession.reportDialogDescription: Do you want to mark this question as incorrect?
testSession.reportedQuestionDescription: You already reported this question before.
testSession.disabledQuestionDescription: This question is disabled and does not count in this test.
testSession.finalizeDialogTitle: Do you want to finish the test?
testSession.finalizeDialogDescription: Your current answers will be graded and the final result will be shown.
testSession.leaveDialogTitle: Are you sure you want to leave?
testSession.leaveDialogDescription: You have a test in progress. If you leave now, the timer will pause and you can resume it later from the dashboard.
testSession.resultDialogDescription: You completed the quick test. Here is your final summary.
testSession.noCorrectionKeyLabel: This question has no correction key.
testSession.noExplanationLabel: No explanation available for this question.

planPanel.proDesc: Unlimited tests, AI Assistant and full syllabus.
planPanel.freeDesc: Access unlimited tests and the AI Assistant.

editProfile.title: Edit your information
editProfile.desc: Keep your details up to date. Some changes are reflected immediately across the app.
editProfile.avatarFormat: PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF. Maximum 2 MB.
editProfile.oppositionLocked: You have already changed your exam track once. It cannot be changed again.
editProfile.changesNote: Changes are saved to your personal account.

dialog.title: Confirm exam track change
dialog.description: You are about to change your active exam track to "{{name}}". Do you want to continue?
dialog.warning: This is your only opportunity to change your exam track. Once confirmed, it cannot be modified again.

toasts.invalidFormat: Upload a PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF image.
toasts.invalidSession: Sign in again to change your photo.
toasts.avatarSaveFailed: Could not save the profile photo.
toasts.avatarRemoveFailed: Could not remove the profile photo.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.desc: For security, we will close other active sessions after the change.
changePassword.sessionWarning: When you change your password, sessions on other devices will be closed. You will have to sign in again where needed.

errors.minRequirements: Password does not meet the minimum requirements.

privacy.title: Your data, under your control
privacy.desc: We fully comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Here you can exercise all your rights.
privacy.permissionsDesc: Control how we use your data. These changes are immediate.
privacy.toggleNewsDesc: New tests, assistant improvements and important changes.
privacy.toggleAnalyticsDesc: Helps us improve tests and answer rankings.
privacy.deleteDescription: We will permanently delete your progress, history, conversations, and personal data within 72 hours. Invoices are kept for tax obligations.

contactTab.title: Tell us what you need.
contactTab.desc: The more detail you give us, the sooner we can resolve it. We respond in less than 24 business hours.
contactTab.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Describe what happened, when and what you expected to see. If it is a technical error, indicate browser and device.
contactTab.autoSession: We will automatically attach your session data to speed up the response.

errors.subject: Add a brief subject.
errors.message: Tell us a bit more (minimum 20 characters).

contactTab.successDesc: We have received your request. You will receive a response in less than 24 business hours at {{email}}.
contactTab.sidebarDesc: These articles resolve {{pct}}% of the requests we receive.
contactTab.availabilityActive: The contact form is active. We respond in less than 24 business hours.
contactTab.availabilityInactive: The contact form is not available right now. Contact us by email.

toasts.sentDesc: We have received your request. We will respond in less than 24 business hours.
toasts.errorDesc: Could not send your request. Please try again.
